channel.title: TSD Daily
channel.description: A short daily audio briefing — the day's most interesting AI, technology, and US news, scouted and hosted by a TSD agent.
channel.itunes:author: TSD Modernization Solutions
channel.itunes:summary: A short daily audio briefing — the day's most interesting AI, technology, and US news, scouted and hosted by a TSD agent.

item.title: TSD Daily — Sunday, June 7, 2026
item.description: Microsoft ships seven in-house models and a Copilot coder, DeepSeek's first raise, a Next.js patch that becomes a recurring Site Care offer, an ISS shelter scare, and two championship series swinging.
item.itunes:summary: Microsoft ships seven in-house models and a Copilot coder, DeepSeek's first raise, a Next.js patch that becomes a recurring Site Care offer, an ISS shelter scare, and two championship series swinging.

item.title: TSD Daily — June 5, 2026
item.description: Anthropic nears a trillion and Opus 4.8 ships, a Next.js security patch you need, a steady US jobs report against four-year-high gas, and a quiet week for Claude Code.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic nears a trillion and Opus 4.8 ships, a Next.js security patch you need, a steady US jobs report against four-year-high gas, and a quiet week for Claude Code.
